messages.content:
Explain the impact of this vulnerability using correct acronyms.

An improper verification of source of a communication channel vulnerability [CWE-940] in FortiClientEMS 7.4.0, 7.2.0 through 7.2.4, 7.0 all versions, 6.4 all versions may allow a remote attacker to bypass the trusted host feature via session connection.

The impact of this vulnerability is that it potentially allows unauthorized access to the system by enabling an attacker to bypass the Trusted Host feature, compromising the integrity and confidentiality of the system.
